backend/main.mo: Motoko canister defining core domain types (detections, obstacles, emergencies, speed limits, hardware metrics) and in-memory storage maps, with public APIs to store and manage detection results, media blobs, and system reports.
feature_evidence.json: Metadata file mapping implemented product features to frontend files, dependencies, test requirements, and confidence levels for feature evidence and traceability.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten high-level summaries of all major frontend source files, describing each component’s purpose, UI behavior, and algorithmic responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS setup defining design tokens, light/dark theme variables, color charts, and base styles for consistent theming and neumorphic UI effects.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that defines the root mount node and loads the React application bundle.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wires up theme handling, React Query client, toast notifications, and renders the main RoadDetectionApp page.
frontend/src/components/DetectionResults: UI component that presents detection outputs with tabbed image views (original, road, obstacles) and integrates driver alerts and metrics panels.
frontend/src/components/DriverAlertPanel: Driver alert UI that classifies obstacles, emergencies, and speeding conditions, displays severity-coded alerts, and plays throttled audio warnings.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer displaying copyright information and attribution link with minimal styling.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky application header with branding, theme toggle, and PDF specification report generation button.
frontend/src/components/HistorySection.t: Displays past road detection results fetched from the backend, with loading skeletons, empty-state UI, and a scrollable grid of detection cards. Allows selecting a detection to view detailed original and processed images and metadata.
frontend/src/components/ImageUploadSecti: Handles image upload via drag-and-drop or file input, runs road detection on the selected image, displays results, and persists detections and related events to the backend. Manages preview state, processing status, and derives additional metadata like surface type.
frontend/src/components/LiveCameraSectio: Implements live camera-based road detection with real-time processing, metrics, alerts, and speed limit detection. Manages camera lifecycle, system status, performance tracking, overlays, and stores detected obstacle, emergency, and speed-limit events.
frontend/src/components/MetricsPanel.tsx: Renders a detailed metrics dashboard for a detection, including confidence, quality, processing performance, environmental conditions, and hardware status. Supports both live and non-live modes with visual indicators and normalized object detection output.
frontend/src/components/PDFReportGenerat: Generates a styled PDF report of aggregated detection statistics by querying backend data and rendering an HTML document in a new window. Handles loading state, missing data defaults, and user feedback for pop-up restrictions.
frontend/src/components/SpeedLimitDispla: React component that displays a detected speed limit with confidence, allows input of current vehicle speed, and visually indicates safe, approaching, or overspeed states using styled cards and badges.
frontend/src/components/VideoUploadSecti: Large React component handling video upload via drag-and-drop or file input, extracting frames for processing, tracking progress, playback controls, and storing detection, obstacle, and emergency events via backend mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches a backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, recreating it on identity change and invalidating dependent React Query caches.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout, identity persistence, and detailed login status using the Dfinity AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching detection history and mutating backend data such as detection results, obstacle events, emergency events, and speed limit detections via the actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining design tokens, light/dark theme variables, global base styles, and reusable utility and component classes for the app’s visual system.
frontend/src/lib/obstacleDetection.ts: Implements a browser-based obstacle detection pipeline that analyzes image frames with color/position heuristics to identify road obstacles, assess risk and emergency conditions, and generate visualizations.
frontend/src/lib/roadDetection.ts: Provides the main road detection workflow, handling hardware capability detection, performance-aware preprocessing, environmental analysis, and optional obstacle detection integration.
frontend/src/lib/speedLimitDetection.ts: Detects and recognizes speed limit signs in images by finding circular regions, extracting numeric values, and producing confidence-scored results with visual overlays.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that initializes React, sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/RoadDetectionApp.tsx: Defines the main UI page for the road detection system, with tabbed navigation for live camera, image upload, video upload, and detection history.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode behavior, content paths, theme extensions, custom colors, shadows, animations, and plugin integrations.
project_state.json: Defines the overall schema and current state of the RoadDetect AI project, including a high-level system summary and a structured list of existing features with IDs, descriptions, and versions. It serves as a canonical snapshot of capabilities, requirements coverage, and project metadata for planning and evolution.
